summary: The fix correctly addresses VAL-MED-005 by adding a default port (8080) fallback when config.AppConfig.HTTPPort is 0. This prevents the health check from failing when the configuration hasn't been fully initialized. The implementation is minimal, follows CLAUDE.md patterns, and 8080 is the documented default port throughout the codebase.

sharedStateObservations.description: The default port 8080 is consistently used across documentation (CLAUDE.md, sample.env, README.md), Docker configs, and now the health check code. This shows good alignment between documentation and implementation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: CLAUDE.md line 265 shows 'HTTP_PORT (default 8080)', sample.env line 60 shows 'HTTP_PORT=8080', and the fix at main.go line 46 uses 'healthPort = 8080'
